title: wildcard literals
text: wildcard literals Allow wildcard literals in actual data. USYS$INF_PARAMS wildcard literals Use This option is applicable only for wildcard literals used in Uniface retrieve profiles. wildcard literals is not supported in combination with multi byte . Description If this option is set, when a wildcard literal is included in the actual data, it is escaped out so Informix does not treat it as a wildcard. If this option is not present, no wildcard literals are allowed. Related Links multi byte Enable multi-byte character sets. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
